behaviors.description: `=SUM(A1:A10)` evaluates to the correct sum for A1..A10.
behaviors.justification: Exercises formula parsing, range resolution, and SUM function wiring together; no external infrastructure is required.
behaviors.test_description: Create cells A1..A10 with known numeric values, set target cell to `=SUM(A1:A10)`, recalculate, and assert exact numeric result.

behaviors.justification: Validates dependency graph wiring and multi-cell evaluation flow inside engine components.

behaviors.description: Circular dependency is detected and reported as circular-reference error.
behaviors.justification: Requires interaction of reference resolution and cycle detection logic; still internal wiring.
behaviors.test_description: Set `A1==B1+1` and `B1==A1+1`, run evaluation, assert circular-reference error and no infinite loop.

behaviors.description: `VLOOKUP` exact match returns correct value and missing key returns error.
behaviors.justification: Combines parser, table/range lookup mechanics, and built-in function behavior across cells.
behaviors.test_description: Build a small lookup table range, evaluate exact-match lookup and missing-key lookup, assert returned value and expected error type.

behaviors.justification: Tests expression evaluation and nested function composition across condition branches.
behaviors.test_description: Set `A1` to values across boundary cases (e.g., 5, 15, 25), evaluate nested IF formula, assert outputs `low/medium/high` respectively.

behaviors.description: `CONCATENATE` joins values with separator and skips empty cells.
behaviors.justification: Requires function semantics plus cell value retrieval behavior across multiple references.
behaviors.test_description: Populate referenced cells with text and empties, apply CONCATENATE pattern with separator, assert output omits empty-cell placeholders.

behaviors.description: Cross-sheet reference (e.g., `=Sheet2!A1+1`) resolves when sheet exists.
behaviors.justification: Validates inter-sheet reference wiring within workbook model; no external infra dependency.
behaviors.test_description: Create Sheet1 and Sheet2, set `Sheet2!A1`, evaluate `Sheet1!A1==Sheet2!A1+1`, assert correct result.

behaviors.description: Dependent formulas recalculate in correct topological order after referenced value change.
behaviors.justification: Primarily dependency-graph wiring and recomputation orchestration inside engine.
behaviors.test_description: Create multi-level dependency chain/diamond, change a source cell, trigger recalculation, assert all downstream cells update to expected values.

behaviors.description: Undo after formula edit restores formula text and prior dependent computed values.
behaviors.justification: Exercises edit history and recomputation coordination across subsystems, but not external infra.
behaviors.test_description: Record baseline formula/dependent results, edit formula and recalc, perform undo, assert original formula text and dependent values are fully restored.

behaviors.description: Save/load round-trip preserves formulas and values with no floating-point precision drift.
behaviors.justification: Touches real disk persistence in custom binary format (`real_infra`), which maps to System by rule.
behaviors.test_description: Create workbook with varied formulas and floating-point values, save to disk, reload, and assert formula text and numeric values (with strict precision policy) are identical.
